---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect affecting mobile validation, app behavior, or release readiness
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the defect clearly.

## Affected area

- Mobile runtime behavior
- Build or CI validation
- Platform-specific behavior
- Documentation or release notes

## Current behavior

What is happening now?

## Expected behavior

What should happen instead?

## Reproduction or evidence

Provide steps, devices, emulator details, logs, screenshots, or test output.

## Impact

- [ ] Blocks local development
- [ ] Blocks app validation or release readiness
- [ ] Affects platform-specific behavior
- [ ] Affects shared contracts or SDK consumers

## Notes

Add platform, store, or follow-up context here.
